# xenios

> xenios (Xenios Technologies) is the AI-native operating system for proactive
> health — the orchestration layer connecting every signal, every workflow,
> and every practitioner moving care upstream of disease. Headquartered in
> Austin, TX. Pre-seed. In stealth.

## Core facts
- Product: AI-native operating system for proactive health
- Capabilities: 8 agents + Conductor · telemedicine · storefront · network · ontology · developers · enterprise
- Heritage: from the team behind $710M+ in prior exits, including FinDox and InstaMed
- HQ: Austin, TX, USA
- Contact: team@xeniostechnology.com
- Instagram: @officialxenios
- LinkedIn: /company/officialxenios
- Status: stealth, pre-seed, waitlist open

## Ecosystem (designed to connect with — not partnerships)
WHOOP · Oura · Apple Health · Garmin · Polar · Fitbit · Eight Sleep · Levels ·
Lingo · Dexcom · Stelo · Function Health · Superpower · Inside Tracker ·
Marek Health · Hone · Maximus · Ezra · Prenuvo · Neko Health · Cleerly ·
Fullscript · Wellevate · Rupa Health · Thorne · Pure Encapsulations ·
Momentous · Designs for Health · Hyperice · Therabody · Plunge · Sunlighten ·
Cronometer · MacroFactor · Headspace · Calm · Anthropic · OpenAI ·
Stripe · Plaid · FHIR · Surescripts.

Brand names are property of their respective owners. Integration availability varies.
